transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Welcome back to the show.
[00:00:02.84] Dog is my co-pilot. We're two bad bitches deliver food.
[00:00:07.00] We're taking, we're still taking this Alaskan reindeer hot dog with blue cheese and bacon topping on it.
[00:00:16.00] It's a pair at the gourmet hot dog restaurant. It's called a conspiracy topping blend.
[00:00:23.00] Yeah. Or some shit.
[00:00:24.00] Yeah.
[00:00:25.00] It does not make any sense. I don't know.
[00:00:28.00] Who started that restaurant?
[00:00:38.00] If you're not familiar with the term loadout, it means lower downtown.
[00:00:43.00] And they have, like, this very gourmet hot dog restaurant where you can get,
[00:00:51.00] you know, like, fesent and rattlesnake dogs.
[00:00:56.00] Seems kind of cruel.
[00:00:58.00] I say go out and catch your own fes-
